result.stdout:
Description:
  LogPulse — distributed log analytics engine

Usage:
  LogPulse [options]

Options:
  -i, --input <input>          Path to log file. Omit to read from stdin.
  -w, --workers <workers>      Number of parallel ingestion threads. [default: 4]
  -k, --top-k <top-k>          Size of the Top-K heavy hitters list. [default: 10]
  -W, --window <window>        Sliding window duration in seconds. [default: 60]
  -m, --mem-limit <mem-limit>  Soft memory ceiling in MB. Controls log verbosity under pressure. [default: 512]
  -v, --verbose                Enable verbose (Debug) logging. [default: False]
  --build-info                 Print build metadata and exit.
  --version                    Show version information
  -?, -h, --help               Show help and usage information
